title: ml.forecast

job_id.description:
Identifier for the anomaly detection job. The job must be open when you
create a forecast; otherwise, an error occurs.

duration.description: Refer to the description for the `duration` query parameter.

expires_in.description: Refer to the description for the `expires_in` query parameter.

max_model_memory.description: Refer to the description for the `max_model_memory` query parameter.

description:
Predict future behavior of a time series.

Forecasts are not supported for jobs that perform population analysis; an
error occurs if you try to create a forecast for a job that has an
`over_field_name` in its configuration. Forcasts predict future behavior
based on historical data.
